## ![](https://businessunitprofile-cdn.trustpilot.net/businessunitprofile-consumersite/public/trustpilot-shield.svg) We use technology to protect platform integrity, but we don't fact-check reviews

While we don't verify specific claims because reviewers' opinions are their own, we may label reviews as "Verified" when we can confirm a business interaction took place. [Read more](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/About-Trustpilots-review-labels?language=en_US)

To protect platform integrity, every review on our platform—verified or not—is screened by our 24/7 automated software. This technology is designed to identify and remove content that breaches our guidelines, including reviews that are not based on a genuine experience. We recognise we may not catch everything, and you can flag anything you think we may have missed. [Read more](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/How-consumers-can-flag-reviews-that-breach-our-guidelines?language=en_US)

## Review summary

Created with AI, based on recent reviews

Considering 38 reviews, reviewers overwhelmingly had a great experience with this company. Customers consistently praise the staff for their friendliness, helpfulness, and expertise, which significantly enhanced their trips. Many highlight the excellent service, noting that the company's smooth planning and organization made their holidays enjoyable and stress-free. The locations visited, including Ijen, Bromo, and various waterfalls, were also highly appreciated.

Reviewers frequently mention the positive user experience, emphasizing the guides' ability to make them feel safe, informed, and well-cared for throughout their journeys. The guides often went above and beyond, assisting with logistics, taking photos, and providing valuable insights into the areas.See more

### Written by the company

In the chaotic and often unregulated world of adventure tourism, Java Volcano Tour Operator (JVTO) stands as a singular anomaly in East Java. We are not just a travel agency; we are the region’s only expedition specialist founded and led by an active Tourist Police officer, Mr. Agung ("Mr. Sam") Sambuko.

This unique lineage defines everything we do. While other operators compete on rock-bottom prices, JVTO competes on peace of mind. Born from Mr. Sam’s years of experience protecting tourists and witnessing the gaps in local safety standards, JVTO was built to bridge the divide between wild, raw adventure and professional, verified security. When you book with us, you aren't just hiring a driver; you are engaging a team that operates with the discipline and logistical oversight of a security operation, backed by official government licensing (NIB 1102230032918).

But safety is just the foundation; connection is the experience. We believe that a tour is only as good as the person leading it. That is why we don’t use random freelancers. Our team consists of local legends like Gufron, who doubles as a professional photographer for your memories; Rendi, our technical specialist for the arduous Ijen crater descent; and Pras, a driver whose safety record is as impeccable as his English.

At JVTO, we trade in radical transparency. We will never promise you the "Blue Fire" if nature decides otherwise, nor will we hit you with hidden fees halfway up a mountain. We promise you a private, seamless, and deeply personal journey through the fires of Ijen and the mists of Bromo, knowing that behind every breathtaking moment is a rigorous infrastructure of safety watching your back.

This is East Java, verified.See more

![Rated 5 out of 5 stars](https://cdn.trustpilot.net/brand-assets/4.1.0/stars/stars-5.svg)

[**I recently joined a tour to East Java…**](https://www.trustpilot.com/reviews/68eb9bb3aaf3d528d97fcfb7)

I recently joined a tour to East Java with JVTO, and it was absolutely incredible! Our guide, Gufron, and driver, Holili, made the entire trip so comfortable and safe.

Gufron was so knowledgeable, friendly, and attentive. He made sure we are safe during the hike and help taking many pictures for us. He also chooses good spots for photos 🤣.

Thanks to both of them, we got to see the best of East Java — from sunrise at Mount Bromo to the blue fire of Ijen — all perfectly organized and stress-free. However, keep in mind, ljen can be dangerous when going down to see the blue fire, requiring hiker to be good in shape.

It’s sad when we went back to Bali and couldn’t find good tour guide like them.

October 8, 2025

Unprompted review

Thank you so much, Nina!

We’re so happy to hear you had an incredible time on the Ultimate Volcano Journey: 3D2N Bali – Mount Ijen – Mount Bromo – Madakaripura Waterfall – Surabaya. Gufron and Holili will be thrilled to know their effort made your trip comfortable, safe, and memorable! 🙏

You captured East Java perfectly — from Bromo’s sunrise to Ijen’s blue fire, it truly is an unforgettable experience. Thank you for the kind words and thoughtful reminder about the Ijen hike 💙

We hope to welcome you back again for another adventure in Java soon!

Warm regards,

Java Volcano Tour Operator Team

We can only praise the JVTO team, and above all our guide Rendi and our driver Joyo, in the highest terms. We came across JVTO by chance, and looking back, we are incredibly grateful for the great experience and unforgettable memories. From pick-up to support/accompaniment and communication to the spectacular unsolicited photo sessions followed by photo uploads, everything was perfect. We were always kept fully informed about the itinerary, the accommodations we chose were great, and we were always helped with ideas and transportation services when it came to meals. We wish the JVTO team all the best!

We joined the tour from 31/7 to 3/8. We have had a great trip with our driver, Dika, he was being very helpful and caring, sharing things about Indonesia with us, taking us to different local and good restaurants, and also taking good care of us. He also provided flexibility for us to decide our schedules, I highly appreciate his professionalism!!

Besides, for the Ijen tour, our guide, Rendi, also helped us a lot, he kept asking about our condition when we went up the mountain so that we were able to rest at any time. When we went down the steep crater, he held our hands to prevent us from falling. I like his energy that makes our journey so happy and memorable!

[**Ijen and Bromo tour**](https://www.trustpilot.com/reviews/6884abe81a07648212569608)

We had such an amazing experience doing Ijen, Mount Bromo and the waterfall. It truly was a once in a lifetime experience. Our driver Johan went above and beyond to help us, he was always in such a happy, positive mood even with the early starts and it really added to the experience. We loved the music he played and couldn’t help but sing along with him to the songs! He was so helpful and a true expert getting us everywhere nice and early and showing us where to go for the best sunrise during Bromo. My husband actually forgot to bring trousers and Johan was quick to let him borrow his and he also gave me his extra jacket at one point to stay warm. I cannot fully express my gratitude for everything Johan did. He is a true asset to your company! I hope one day we can do another tour with him.

Jun 22, 2025

![Rated 4 out of 5 stars](https://cdn.trustpilot.net/brand-assets/4.1.0/stars/stars-4.svg)

[**3D2N Ijen, Bromo and Madakapuri Waterfall**](https://www.trustpilot.com/reviews/6857c2bef34bcf699479ec09)

Hello. I would like to give my review for the trip!

Overall we are very happy with the service given by the local guide! Freddy our guide and driver was excellent in taking care of us and meeting our needs. He is also fun to talk to, and helped us to take nice photos too. Towards the end, we felt really sad to say goodbye 🥲

Boi, our local guide over at Ijen was amazing. He briefed us on Ijen and throughout the tough difficult trail, he guided us and make sure we are ok. We felt safe with him and we are so so glad he was very patient with us. He is also funny too 😆

Overall the trip was amazing, we loved it. The only feedback we have were the accomodation

For the first accommodation, Baratha Hotel, the walls were very thin and the room was too dark. When we were trying to get some rest, the guests next room were making too much noise that we can’t get enough sleep for the Ijen hike 😣

And then when we went to the second accommodation, Joglo Kecombrang, it was not well lit and the walls were too thin. There was a nearby neighbour who was playing loud music and because we were very tired from Ijen, we can’t sleep for Bromo. Worst of all, the water heater was not working so I didn’t shower for that night, making me very cranky and agitated because of the lack of sleep and no water heater.

Other than that, the trip, the guides and experience was amazing. Definitely recommended (but with a change in accommodation)

June 18, 2025

Unprompted review

![Java Volcano Tour Operator logo](https://consumersiteimages.trustpilot.net/business-units/655cc467eee2b94b13da6cb2-198x149-1x.jpg)

Reply from Java Volcano Tour Operator

Jul 7, 2025

Hi there,

Thank you so much for taking the time to share such a detailed and honest review!

We're truly happy to hear that you had an amazing experience overall — especially with Freddy and Boi. They’ll be delighted to know their care, patience, and fun personalities helped make your journey memorable and enjoyable. Saying goodbye is never easy when the connection is that special 🥲

We also want to sincerely thank you for your honest feedback about the accommodations. We truly understand how important rest and comfort are, especially on a physically demanding trip like this. We will follow up with our accommodation partners to improve the experience, including room lighting, sound insulation, and water heater reliability.

Your feedback is very valuable for us to keep improving, and we’re so glad to know that despite those challenges, you would still recommend the tour. We hope to welcome you again in the future — with better rest and the same great adventure!

### The TrustpilotExperience

#### We're open to all

[Anyone](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/Who-can-write-a-review-and-when?language=en_US) can write a Trustpilot review. People who write reviews have ownership to edit or delete them at any time, and they’ll be displayed as long as an [account is active](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/Whats-the-retention-period-of-reviews?language=en_US).

#### We champion verified reviews

Companies can ask for reviews via automatic invitations. Labeled Verified, they’re about genuine experiences.

[Learn more](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/How-do-reviews-get-on-Trustpilot?utm_campaign=verified&utm_content=verified_tooltip&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=transparency_page&language=en_US) about other kinds of reviews.

#### We fight fake reviews

We use dedicated people and clever technology to safeguard our platform. Find out how we [combat fake reviews](https://www.trustpilot.com/trust/combating-fake-reviews).

#### We show the latest reviews

Learn about Trustpilot’s [review process](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/The-journey-of-reviews-on-Trustpilot?language=en_US).

#### We encourage constructive feedback

Here are [8 tips for writing great reviews](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/8-tips-for-writing-great-customer-reviews?language=en_US).

#### We verify reviewers

Verification can help ensure [real people](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/Verify-your-identity-with-photo-ID?language=en_US) are writing the reviews you read on Trustpilot.

#### We advocate against bias

Offering incentives for reviews or asking for them selectively can bias the TrustScore, which goes [against our guidelines](https://help.trustpilot.com/s/article/Who-can-write-a-review-and-when?language=en_US).

[Take a closer look](https://www.trustpilot.com/trust)
